---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for empathySync
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The Problem
What problem would this feature solve? What frustration does it address?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Philosophy Check
Please consider before submitting:

- [ ] This feature aligns with "optimize for exit, not engagement"
- [ ] This feature does NOT increase user dependency on AI
- [ ] This feature maintains local-first privacy (no external API calls)
- [ ] This feature does NOT use dark patterns or manipulation

If any boxes are unchecked, please explain why the feature is still valuable.

## Impact
Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Users seeking practical task help
- [ ] Users working through sensitive topics
- [ ] Developers/contributors
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools.
